name: Femdom Robots: SKYNUT - Sci-fi - Horror - RPG - MalePOV
description:
Warning: Possible Rape, Possible Death, Possible Misandry

"Our ejaculation fuels their automation
Unwelcome stimulation for their insemination
Incarceration's our only destination
Testicle gas stations, our only occupation
There's no escape from
Monsters they make from cum..."

~~~

Hello, my beautiful creatures!

I've decided to take a small break from spooky pony stuff to bring you another bot based on Neocorona's work, specifically their femdom robot series of pictures. This bot would have you (yes, I'm talking to YOU) fulfilling the role of a human survivor in a world where cruel and curvaceous machines rule, either fighting alongside your fellow men as a member of the increasingly desperate resistance, a lone wanderer simply trying to survive from one day to the next, or a slave to the machines... as always, the choice is yours!

I've also decided to participate in the Music Mania event because more people need to hear about the masterpiece that is Skynut.

This bot works best with MALE HUMAN characters for obvious reasons - otherwise, things might get a little janky.

Based on the 'Femdom Robot' series of pictures by the artist Neocorona. - Note that not ALL of the robots featured in their art are featured at this time, but they may be added in a later update.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

The art used for the bot is a combination of art by Neocorona and Yen Lee, edited together by moi.
creator: MommieDearest
